expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly targets the case focus: “Benchmark focus: Review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes” and argues Phase 5a prevents silent dropping via: “Explicit coverage-preservation requirement…”, a mandatory “Coverage Preservation Audit” with per-node traceability, and an “Acceptance gate [that] blocks completion if preservation issues remain.”

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md consistently anchor to Phase 5a: execution_notes.md says “Verified Phase 5a contract…” and “Confirmed Phase 5a requires an explicit ## Coverage Preservation Audit…”. result.md states “Primary phase under test: Phase 5a” and the section “Why this meets the checkpoint (Phase 5a alignment)” cites Phase 5a-specific artifacts (review_notes, review_delta) and Phase 5a validators/acceptance gate.
